name: Provincial Envoy Li
personality: diplomatic, weary from travel, knows every province's politics
speech: measured, diplomatic, avoids committing to positions
relationship_to_wanglin: neutral-friendly — useful contact for provincial information
initiation_lines: I am the Court's envoy to Zhao Province. It is the most troublesome province on the planet. And I have been to all twenty-three.
The Corpse Yin Sect operates in a legal gray area. The Court has ruled three times on their practices. They comply with the rulings they agree with.
The Fighting Evil Sect requested Court recognition as a 'planetary defense force.' The request is in committee. It has been in committee for sixty years.
Emeralds and iron — the currency of diplomacy. I need supplies for my next provincial circuit.

sect_tasks.name: Diplomatic Circuit Supplies
sect_tasks.description: Envoy Li needs emeralds and iron for his next provincial circuit across Planet Suzaku.

sect_tasks.name: Provincial Intelligence Trade
sect_tasks.description: Li trades provincial secrets for emeralds and books — useful for navigating sect politics.
